nasb.text: The sluggard buries his hand in the dish, But will not even bring it back to his mouth.

esv.text: The sluggard buries his hand in the dish and will not even bring it back to his mouth.

cnv.text: 懶惰人把手放在盤子裡， 連拿食物送回口邊，也不願意。

ccb.text: 懒惰人手放在餐盘， 却懒得送食物进嘴。

csbs.text: 懒惰的人手放在盘子里， 甚至懒得拿起手把食物放进口中。
